temporal_description: A low-angle, static shot captures a man in a dimly lit, dark room. The man, wearing a dark, patterned sweater, is positioned on his hands and knees on a wooden floor, looking up towards the camera with a pained and distressed expression. The background is shrouded in shadow, with only the man and the wooden planks of the floor clearly visible. In the top right corner of the screen, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The audio opens with a low, somber, and melancholic musical score that creates a tense and melancholic atmosphere. A man's strained, pained voice is heard, filled with effort and distress. He begins with a sharp, gasping sound, as if he's struggling to breathe or is in great physical discomfort. His hands are clasped together in front of his face as he continues to look up, his expression shifting to one of anguish. He then speaks in a low, strained voice, his words coming out in short, effortful bursts. The Chinese characters "很有效" appear in white at the bottom of the frame. The man's face is contorted in a grimace, conveying deep pain or desperation. The camera remains fixed in its low-angle position, emphasizing the man's vulnerable and pained state. The background music continues to underscore the feeling of struggle and emotional turmoil. The scene is devoid of any other sound effects, focusing entirely on the man's pained vocalizations and the somber musical backdrop.
